hub_subtitle: Business English from the ground up -- your work, your team, your routine

lesson.menu_desc: Review of Lessons 1-7: present + past, compare your progress -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 8 -- Review: Lessons 1-7 -- Look How Far You've Come
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Danilo Febba | Aula 8 -- Review: Lessons 1-7

listenings.text: Hi Danilo, it's Rachel. I just want to say great job this month. I remember Lesson 1, your first day. You were a little quiet, and you said only short sentences. Now look at you! You talk about your team, your routine, and the project. You ask good questions, and you give clear answers. You make small mistakes sometimes, but that is normal. The important thing is that you practice every day and you improve. I am really happy with your progress. Keep going, and soon you will be very confident. See you in class. Bye!

Let me compare Lesson 1 and Lesson 8. In Lesson 1, I was nervous. I only said my name and my job. I did not ask questions. Now, in Lesson 8, I am more confident. I talk about my work every day. Yesterday, I had a meeting in English, and I asked three questions. Last week, I wrote a short report in English too. I still make mistakes, but I remember the words better now. My goal is to practice more and to improve every week. I think I made good progress, and I want to achieve more.
